questionHtml:
An object of mass 1.0 kg hangs at rest from a spring. The spring has a negligible mass and the spring constant k is 20 N m−1

What is the elastic potential energy stored in the spring?


A.  1.0 J

B.  2.5 J

C.  5.0 J

D.  10 J
